callback.title: Authorize EVE Online
callback.description:
1. **Click the link below** to authorize with EVE Online:

{auth_url}

2. Log in with your EVE account

3. After authorization, you will be redirected to a success page

4. **Copy the ENTIRE URL from your browser's address bar** and paste it below

error.no_code: No authorization code found in URL
error.state_mismatch: Security state mismatch. Please try again
error.exchange_failed: Failed to exchange code for tokens. The proxy server may be unavailable.
error.verify_failed: Failed to verify character identity with EVE
error.network_error: Network error communicating with the proxy server
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the logs for details.
